title: One
description: Adds the album One by C418 to Minecraft.
body:
Adds the album [One](https://c418.org/albums/one/) by [C418](https://c418.org/) on top of the current Minecraft soundrack.

The new songs always play in the menu and credits, and plays together with the usual Minecraft sountrack during gameplay.

Editor's note - One is probably my favourite album from any artist ever.
